text.text: Look no further, y’all! When our AC was refusing to cool on Sunday afternoon, we called My AC San Antonio to help. Without hesitation, they arrived at our house within 30 mins to properly troubleshoot and fix our issue. Paul was absolutely a pleasure and was fantastic in explaining his diagnosis clearly and professionally. He was extremely diligent and thorough and did not leave our home until he knew for sure that our AC was cooling properly. If you’re looking for a local, reliable, honest, and professional AC company who will treat you like family, you won’t regret calling these guys for all of your heating and cooling needs. Five stars and two thumbs up for sure!!

text.text: My heat pump was not heating or cooling much at all so I read the reviews of several local companies and decided on My AC. I’m glad I did! Paul arrived within the hour and took his time in correctly diagnosing the problem. Very informative and professional, and very competitive prices. Paul fixed the problem and stayed until he was satisfied the entire system was working correctly. I strongly recommend My AC San Antonio.

text.text: We had local company come out to our house that gave us ridiculously large estimates (4 in fact) without fully evaluating the system. Then we reached out to a friend in Austin with HVAC experience who recommended we call Paul. Paul is amazing and was at the house with in a couple of hours. He completely  troubleshot the system and fixed the issue at fractions of the previously quoted costs. And there was no pressure for the up sale. Highly recommended!!!

text.text: Paul was very helpful, and arrived very quickly after I called. We live about 20 miles South of San Antonio, and he still made the drive. Our A/C was not working, and my kids and I were super uncomfortable. He fixed the problem, and was very fair and upfront with prices. We will be calling him in the future when we need repairs. Thank-you!!

text.text: Paul was a tremendous help to me and my family he showed up within two hours of me calling him completely serviced my AC unit drain included. Paul did not overcharge me or try to pay for unnessary items. Paul was very courteous and professional I will recommend him to anybody at any time. He has my loyalty and future business.
